executive_summary: Build workflow dispatch failed with HTTP 404 error. The GitHub Actions workflow file (.github/workflows/build.yml) was not found or is not accessible on the scib_demo repository's main branch. This is a critical configuration error preventing any build execution.

errors.title: GitHub Actions Workflow File Not Found
errors.description: The workflow dispatch API call to trigger the build.yml workflow returned HTTP 404 Not Found. This indicates the workflow file does not exist at the expected path (.github/workflows/build.yml) or the GitHub token lacks necessary permissions to access it.
errors.error_message: HTTP Error 404: Not Found. Workflow dispatch endpoint returned 404. Possible causes: token missing workflow/actions permissions, workflow not accessible on this repo/branch, or Actions disabled. dispatch_url=https://api.github.com/repos/loginkarun/scib_demo/actions/workflows/.github%2Fworkflows%2Fbuild.yml/dispatches response_body={"message":"Not Found","documentation_url":"https://docs.github.com/rest/actions/workflows#create-a-workflow-dispatch-event","status":"404"}
errors.root_cause: The build.yml workflow file is missing from the .github/workflows/ directory in the repository, or the GitHub Personal Access Token (PAT) used for authentication lacks the 'workflow' or 'actions' scope required to dispatch workflows.
errors.impact: Complete build pipeline failure. No builds can be triggered or executed until the workflow file is created or permissions are corrected. This blocks all CI/CD automation for the repository.

errors.title: Missing Action URL for Build Monitoring
errors.description: The action_url field in the build failure log is empty, indicating that no GitHub Actions run was created. This prevents monitoring of build status and log retrieval.
errors.error_message: action_url field is empty string in build_failure_attempt-3.json. Expected format: https://github.com/loginkarun/scib_demo/actions/runs/{RUN_ID}
errors.root_cause: Since the workflow dispatch failed with 404, no Actions run was initiated, resulting in no run ID or action URL being generated.
errors.impact: Unable to retrieve detailed build logs from GitHub Actions API. Cannot perform deep error analysis on Maven build output since the build never executed.

errors.title: GitHub Token Permission Validation Failure
errors.description: The GitHub Personal Access Token may lack the required 'workflow' scope needed to dispatch GitHub Actions workflows via the API.
errors.error_message: Possible causes: token missing workflow/actions permissions, workflow not accessible on this repo/branch, or Actions disabled.
errors.root_cause: The PAT token used for authentication may have been created with insufficient scopes. The 'workflow' scope is required to trigger workflow_dispatch events.
errors.impact: API calls to dispatch workflows will continue to fail until token permissions are updated. This affects all automated build triggers.

steps: 1. Create directory structure: .github/workflows/ in the repository root
3. Add workflow_dispatch trigger to enable manual/API triggering
4. Configure Maven build steps with proper Java setup
5. Commit and push the workflow file to the main branch
recommended_fixes.compliance_notes: Workflow file must include audit logging and security scanning steps per enterprise standards.

steps: 1. Navigate to GitHub Settings > Developer settings > Personal access tokens
2. Locate the token used for CI/CD automation
3. Click 'Edit' and ensure 'workflow' scope is checked
5. Update token in CI/CD secrets/environment variables
recommended_fixes.automation_script: N/A - Manual GitHub UI operation required
recommended_fixes.compliance_notes: Token regeneration must be logged in security audit trail. Old token must be revoked immediately.

steps: 1. Navigate to repository Settings > Actions > General
2. Ensure 'Allow all actions and reusable workflows' is selected
3. Verify Actions are not disabled at organization level
4. Check repository visibility (Actions may be restricted on private repos)
recommended_fixes.compliance_notes: Actions enablement changes must be approved by repository administrators.

audit_log.analysis_method: Automated log parsing and error classification
audit_log.next_steps: Apply recommended fixes FIX-001 and FIX-002, then retry build workflow dispatch.
